items.title: New: Sixers year-in-review keeps on rolling with Trendon Watford, a favorite in the locker room with flashes of unique impact.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
New: Sixers year-in-review keeps on rolling with Trendon Watford, a favorite in the locker room with flashes of unique impact.

With a team option decision coming up, what is next for Watford? Some thoughts:

media.title: Sixers year-in-review: Did Trendon Watford earn his spot?
media.description: Trendon Watford's contract has a small team option for 2026-27. Will he be back?
